story.text:
# 📖 ⿻ Act X: Name Yourself
**act** · swordsman · knowledge · plurality

The Name You Give Yourself. Self-sovereign identity, selective disclosure.
> *The slave is named by the master. The free person names themselves. Self-sovereign identity is the first freedom.*
